word: G830 - αὐθαίρετος - authaíretos - ow-thah'-ee-ret-os - Of own accord

sections.paragraph: சுருக்க விளக்கம் / Short Definition: Of own accord
இலக்கண சொல்வகை / Part(s) of speech: Adjective / பெயரடை
self - chosen, voluntary, of free choice, of one's own accord
ஆங்கில மூலம் / Original in English: From G846 and the same as G140; self chosen, that is, (by implication) voluntary: - of own accord, willing of self.
